findings: Found two non-duplicate public workflow integration coverage gaps: store switch-write misses the bindings-snapshot chain that hooks consume, and doctor mutation CLI tests mock the server instead of exercising real command+filesystem behavior.
issues_found: [{"title":"fabric store switch-write lacks end-to-end coverage for resolved-bindings snapshot refresh","severity":"high","description":"The public onboarding flow tells users to run `fabric store bind` and then `fabric store switch-write`, and hooks read the resolved-bindings snapshot for read/write labels. `bind` refreshes that snapshot, but the `switch-write` command only calls `storeSwitchWrite` and prints success; the helper test asserts only active/default write config fields. A regression can leave the snapshot write_target stale after changing the write store while tests pass.","location":"packages/cli/src/commands/store.ts:190","fix_direction":"Add a command-level integration test that seeds two mounted writable stores, runs the public `store switch-write` command, reads the resolved-bindings snapshot, and asserts `write_target.alias` changes. Update the command to call `regenerateBindingsSnapshot(projectRoot, ...)` after `storeSwitchWrite`; consider the same assertion for `route-write` when write routes affect snapshot resolution.","affected_components":["fabric store switch-write","resolved-bindings snapshot","knowledge hints/hooks","packages/cli/src/store/store-ops.ts","packages/shared/src/store/bindings.ts"],"perspective":"public-workflow-integration-coverage"},{"title":"doctor mutation commands lack real CLI-to-server filesystem integration coverage","severity":"medium","description":"The public `fabric doctor --fix` and `fabric doctor --fix-knowledge` branches call server mutation APIs, render summaries, set exit codes, and run extra CLI-side repairs, but CLI tests mock `@fenglimg/fabric-server` throughout while server tests call `runDoctorFix`/`runDoctorApplyLint` directly. This leaves no gate that runs the actual doctor command against a real temp project/store and verifies both filesystem mutation and CLI output/exit-code behavior across package boundaries.","location":"packages/cli/__tests__/doctor.test.ts:152","fix_direction":"Add one or two slower integration tests that import/run `doctorCommand` without mocking `@fenglimg/fabric-server`, seed a temp project/global store state with a deterministic fixable condition, invoke `--fix` or `--fix-knowledge --yes`, then assert on-disk changes, JSON/human output, store diagnostics, alias-link side effects, and `process.exitCode`.","affected_components":["fabric doctor --fix","fabric doctor --fix-knowledge","packages/cli/src/commands/doctor.ts","packages/server/src/services/doctor.ts","CLI/server package boundary"],"perspective":"public-workflow-integration-coverage"}]
